The '''''Wander''-class jump freighter''' was a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] freighter design.

==History==
It was used during the last years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and continued into the time of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

One ''Wander''-class jump [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]], ''[[Alabak's Gold]]'', was in service to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was used by the Alliance team tasked with [[Escape from Tatooine|retrieving]] [[Adar Tallon/Legends|Adar Tallon]] from [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].<ref name="TM-CA3" />
